CSMAJ.name: Computer Science
CSMAJ.description: The Computer Science major provides a strong foundation in the theory and practice of computing, covering algorithms, programming languages, systems, and artificial intelligence.

rules.description: Minimum 18 units at 3000-level from the major list

SEMAJ.name: Software Engineering
SEMAJ.description: The Software Engineering major focuses on the principles and practices of software development, covering design, construction, testing, and project management.

rules.description: Minimum 18 units at 3000-level from the major list

CYMAJ.name: Cybersecurity
CYMAJ.description: The Cybersecurity major covers the principles and practice of securing computer systems, networks, and data against threats.

rules.description: Minimum 18 units at 3000-level from the major list

MATMAJ.name: Mathematics
MATMAJ.description: The Mathematics major provides a comprehensive education in pure and applied mathematics.
